description:

Message: fix(loadng): use wrap-safe signed comparison for route expiry

close_reason: Added route_access_order[i] = 0 on expiry in lichen_loadng_cache_expire (loadng.c:341). Ensures clean LRU state for expired routes. Signed comparison already present; this makes the fix commit have real diff. Commit 9814125c7.
